title: SpecGate Component Spec
description: Schema for SpecGate .spec.yaml files — declares inputs, types, outputs, and test cases for a single component. Supports single-operation specs (inputs/outcome/outputs at top level) and state machine specs (state/operations).

binding.description: Binding file identifier. Resolves to bindings/<binding>.yaml.

target.description: Name of the execution target defined in the binding file (e.g. 'build', 'test', 'validate')

inputs.description: Named inputs to the component (single-operation specs). Mutually exclusive with 'operations'.

types.description: Named type definitions. Each key is a type name referenced by inputs or outputs.

outcome.description: Outcome declaration for single-operation specs. Use oneof for variant outcomes, or a string for a single outcome type. Mutually exclusive with 'operations'.

outputs.description: Output declarations keyed by outcome branch, e.g. 'when Valid'. For single-operation specs.

additionalProperties.description: Named outputs for this outcome branch.

source.description: Where to observe this output. E.g. 'build-artifact', 'compiler-output'.

state.description: State variables and their types for StateMachine specs. Types match what SpecCapture getters return.

init.description: Initial state values. Required when 'state' is present. Matches what SpecSetup constructor produces.

operations.description: Named operations for StateMachine specs. Each key is an operation name. Mutually exclusive with top-level 'inputs'.

invariants.description: Approved invariants. Keys are invariant names, values are Quint-compatible expressions. Proposed by specgate propose-invariants, approved by user.

inputDeclaration.description: An input declaration with type, optional source annotation, and optional description.

source.description: Where this input comes from if not a function argument. E.g. 'fixture-file', 'env-var'.

typeDefinition.description: A named type. Use 'oneof' for variant types, 'causes' for error types, or bare keys / 'fields' for records.

oneof.description: Variant type (discriminated union) — each key is a variant name, value is an object describing its fields.

causes.description: Error type — each key is a possible cause name, value is an object describing its fields. Maps to error chains (Rust/ohno) or OneOf (C#), not discriminated unions.

fields.description: Record type — each key is a field name, value is a type expression string.

operationDeclaration.description: A named operation in a state machine spec.

outputs.description: Per-outcome output fields for this operation.

testStep.description: A single step in a multi-step test case.

operation.description: Operation name from the operations section.

expected.description: Expected return value (partial match — omitted fields not checked).

assert_state.description: Expected state after this step (partial match — omitted fields not checked).

desc.description: Human-readable description of what this case tests and why.

inputs.description: Input values for single-operation cases. Mutually exclusive with 'steps'.

expected.description: Expected outputs for single-operation cases. Must include 'outcome'. Mutually exclusive with 'steps'.

steps.description: Ordered operation sequence for StateMachine specs. Mutually exclusive with top-level 'inputs'/'expected'.
